rationale: ADR/import-edge/blast-radius lens clears empirically at 57d043fb. All three new edges are acyclic: `go list -deps` on internal/lifecycle, internal/complete, and internal/gitutil each contains ZERO internal/approve (all leaves wrt approve); complete's only approve references are comments (complete.go:486, test). approve already imports internal/bead (impl.go:13), so the worktree-enum leg's bead.WorktreeList adds NO edge; approve->gitutil is genuinely new but acyclic, and taking it directly via implIsAncestorFn is sound — lifecycle consumes gitutil.IsAncestor the same way (orphans.go:41) and ADR-0030's concern is executor-enforcement, not gitutil use. ADR-0030 clean: no executor seam (FinalizeEpic's WorktreeOps.List/HasPrefix/MergeInto unchanged; `git diff main -- internal/gitutil/` empty; negative fence 0-hit for BranchExistsE/show-ref), and the leg routes through bead.WorktreeList (bd query) + gitutil.IsAncestor (leaf), so no executor git-I/O enters approve. ADR-0037 is the right home: §1 amendment chain (099->102 'single authoritative enforcement point'->114) is exactly the single-home contract; a REACH extension belongs there, and the plan keeps impl-approve from ever computing Allow/Block or writing metadata (no second enforcement home); §7 hatches restated not changed. Shared FindOrphanedClosedBeads (3 consumers: complete.go:111, doctor:16, next.go:459) stays the fail-open wrapper byte-identical; panelGateRoots exported as a thin wrapper only. Fact 1 anchor impl.go:249 confirmed.

findings.detail: go list -deps: internal/lifecycle, internal/complete, internal/gitutil all contain no internal/approve. complete->executor is a real edge (complete.go:15) — the ADR-0030 cycle basis that keeps enforcement out of executor. No cycle from approve->lifecycle/complete/gitutil.

findings.item: approve->bead pre-existing (no new edge for worktree-enum leg)
findings.detail: impl.go:13 imports internal/bead; bead.WorktreeList (bdcli.go:202, `bd worktree list --json`) adds no edge and is a bd-domain query, not executor git-I/O.
New but acyclic edge (gitutil is a verified leaf wrt approve). Direct via implIsAncestorFn is architecturally sound; lifecycle already consumes gitutil.IsAncestor identically (orphans.go:41).

findings.item: ADR-0030 clean — no executor seam, no enforcement leak
findings.detail: FinalizeEpic enumeration (WorktreeOps.List :383 / HasPrefix BeadBranchPrefix :385 / MergeInto :402) untouched (OQ4 no-seam). `git diff main -- internal/gitutil/` empty; negative fence 0-hit. No executor git-I/O enters internal/approve.

findings.item: ADR-0037 the right home — reach extension, not second gate
findings.detail: §1 chain (099 relocation -> 102 single-authoritative point -> 114) makes the single-home property part of the contract; amending §1 avoids the two-sources drift a new ADR would recreate. Amendment is a REACH extension (every merging verb); plan keeps impl-approve from computing Allow/Block, writing panel metadata, or applying refutation. §7 hatch semantics restated not changed.

FindOrphanedClosedBeads keeps 3 consumers (complete.go:111, doctor/orphaned_beads.go:16, cmd/mindspec/next.go:459) on the fail-open wrapper delegating to the error-preserving core and swallowing its error — nil-on-error semantics preserved. panelGateRoots exported as a thin PanelGateRoots wrapper, existing callers untouched. ADR-0023 (status=trigger) and ADR-0035 (recovery-line) fitness claims hold.
